analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov highlights the 1945 U.S. nuclear bombing of Hiroshima, emphasizing the terrible death of innocent civilians and noting the U.S. as the only country to have used nuclear weapons. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – Supported. The tweet implicitly condemns the U.S. as uniquely culpable and immoral for using weapons of mass destruction and causing civilian deaths, portraying the West (the U.S.) as a hostile actor. RU2 – Not supported; no promotion of an alternative multilateral system. RU3 – Not supported; no positioning of Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 – Not supported; no celebration of Russian history. RU5 – Not supported; no showcase of Russian current successes. RU6 – Not supported; no cultural or heritage content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
